JournalX
LESSON 02 · RISK

Fix your risk,
fix your curve.

Equity curveRandom riskFixed 1R

Same risk every trade turns a jagged account into a rising one.

journalx.app
Caption 
LESSON 2: Consistency isn't a mindset — it's a position-sizing rule. 📉➡️📈

The red curve is random risk: one oversized loss erases ten good trades. The gold curve is the same trader risking a fixed amount per trade.

Fix your risk (e.g. 1% per trade) and you get shallower drawdowns and a curve that survives losing streaks.

JournalX tracks planned vs realised R and your drawdown so you see the moment you break your own rule.

👉 See your real curve — journalx.app

journalx.app
Caption 
LESSON 3: Your worst habit has a price tag — most traders never see the bill. 🧠

"Control your psychology" is useless until it's a number. Tag the emotion on every trade and the cost becomes obvious:
• Disciplined: +$2,950
• FOMO: −$420
• Tilt: −$680
• Revenge: −$1,240

Fix the most expensive habit first. Then the next. That's how edge compounds.

👉 Put a number on your psychology — journalx.app

LESSON 04 · PROP FIRM

Only 1 in 20
pass the challenge.

5%
pass rate
Pass 5%Fail 95%

They don’t fail on strategy — they blow the drawdown limit in week one.

journalx.app
Caption 
LESSON 4: Most funded traders don't fail on strategy — they fail on risk. 🎯

The data is brutal: only ~5–10% pass a prop firm challenge, and most blow up in the FIRST WEEK by breaching the daily drawdown limit. It's behavioural — oversizing, revenge trades, tilt — not a broken system.

Traders who risk under 2% per trade and track their drawdown are far more likely to stay funded.

JournalX tracks your daily & trailing drawdown, planned vs realised R, and discipline on every trade — so you see the breach coming before it ends your account.

👉 Protect your funded account free — journalx.app

JournalX
LESSON 05 · EXPECTANCY

A 40% win rate
beats 70%.

Same 100 trades — who profits?

Win rate is vanity. Expectancy is what grows the account — and JournalX computes it for you.

journalx.app
Caption 
LESSON 5: A 40% win rate can beat a 70% one. Here's the math most traders never run. 🧮

Win rate alone tells you nothing. A trader who wins 70% but cuts winners and holds losers can barely break even (+0.05R). A trader who wins just 40% with a 1:3 risk-reward compounds hard (+0.60R) — 12× the edge on the same 100 trades.

What actually matters is expectancy: (win% × avg win) − (loss% × avg loss). That's the number that grows an account.

JournalX computes your expectancy, R-multiples, payoff ratio and profit factor automatically from your real trades — so you stop chasing win rate and start building an edge.

👉 See your real expectancy free — journalx.app

Caption (whole carousel) 
5 brutal truths every trader learns too late 👇

1. You don't have a strategy problem — you have a risk problem. Position size blows accounts, not bad setups.
2. Boredom blows more accounts than bad setups. Overtrading adds variance, not edge.
3. Your best trading day can get your payout denied. Prop consistency rules cap how much one day can be — read the fine print.
4. The market doesn't owe you your money back. Revenge trading turns one bad trade into one bad week.

The fix for all four? Journal every trade so you can actually see them. JournalX computes your win rate, risk, drawdown and psychology automatically — free.

👉 journalx.app
